sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n25641" key="dia/pristos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διά-πριστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n25641.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sawn through,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θύρα</foreign> Demioprat. ap.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.24</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
